sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n111372" key="filopa/rugros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φῐλο-πάρυγρος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n111372.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">loving damp,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">φιλογεώργους καὶ φ.</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Cat.Cod.Astr.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8(4).167</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
